# Vikas Menon — vikasmenon.com

> Head of Games & Platform at Terra. Building PlotPix.ai — AI-native video pipeline for vertical content at scale.

## Site Map
- Home: https://vikasmenon.com/
- Projects: https://vikasmenon.com/projects.html
- Work: https://vikasmenon.com/work.html
- Writing: https://vikasmenon.com/articles.html

## Currently Building
- PlotPix.ai (https://www.plotpix.ai) — AI-native video pipeline for short-form vertical content at scale

## Projects
- Bowldem (https://www.bowldem.com) — Daily cricket puzzle game, Wordle for cricket fans
- Rook — Personal AI assistant on OpenClaw, smart home control + daily digests
- Sony TV Skill — OpenClaw skill for controlling Sony Bravia TV via REST API
- Rizz Messenger (https://github.com/ssupppp/redditmessenger) — AI chat challenge game on Reddit/Devvit
- PlayBowldem on Reddit (https://github.com/ssupppp/bowldem-reddit) — Cricket puzzle for Reddit, hackathon 2026
- ValuePickr Chat (https://github.com/ssupppp/valuepickr) — RAG-powered investment forum chat
- Fantasy Team Rater — FPL team rating tool using live API data
- Helicopter Game — One-touch arcade web game

## Work
- PlotPix.ai (2025–present) — AI-native video pipeline at Terra
- Terra / Ripple AI (2024–present) — Head of Games & Platform. Built Snackula, RedFlag.exe, Plumo
- Zynga (2012–2024) — Executive Producer. CSR2 Racing ($1B+ revenue), FarmVille Country Escape (700M+ downloads), Mafia Wars

## Key Topics
Game development, AI-native games, live operations, prompt engineering, velocity, production leadership
